Radical Queer PlayHouse

Radical Queer Playhouse is facilitated by the BigFatPervs every third Saturday of the month in NieuwLand

It is a space where people can come together to find community, share knowledge and experience and learn from each other. Where someone can facilitate or introduce a subject. Where we can hold space for each other and play and learn together. Sharing in knowledge and experience can have different formats but is always a space where we can all participate and explore. Where we are free to bring a subject/practice we are interested in and enjoy, without the need to be an expert on the matter.

Spaces/areas

During Playhouse there are multiple spaces designed for different activities. The main space is an open space with different area’s that are visible from where you enter. The area’s here are:

The Living room

This is where you will find sofas around a small table to sit and chat. There is an area where you can leave your bags and shoes. The stairs upstairs is also in this area hidden in the corner.

The Party Cellar/Saloon

This area can be reached through the living room. There is a step down from the living room, so please watch your step. There is also a ramp available if this is needed. The Party Celler/Saloon is an open space on one side with a big mirror above the steps to the toilets. On the other side is a bar where you can get drinks. In front of the piano is also the spot for the diy suspension point. There are mats stored behind the piano to use during the different activities.

The Kitchen

Behind the bar there is a kitchen designed and stocked to cook for large groups. This is where you can find things like towels, brooms, mops. There are also two large sinks where dishes can be washed and dried. During events where cooking is needed this is the place to do that. The kitchen can be accessed behind the bar or through the dinning room.

The dinning room

The dinning room is in the back of the main area with a long bench along the 2 back walls. There are tables in front of the bench with folded seats on the side that can be used when necessary. On the other side is where you can find the snack table. Depending on the event, the tables can also be removed to extend the open space of the Party Celler/Saloon.

The Garden

Through the dinning room you gain access to the garden. There are chairs to sit and a little campfire pit. There are also ashtrays in this area for the smokers among us.

Above the main space

there are also two separate spaces up the stairs. Both spaces >have windows on the inner and outer walls. The spaces here are:

The Hideout

This space is set up as an office area. It has tables with chairs and there are windows along the outside and inside walls. There is a door you can close to this space if you need a quiet area to sit.

The Crawl space

This is the only space where it is not allowed to take your drinks in. Only closed bottles of water are permitted in this area. On the back wall behind the curtains, you can find mats to place on the floor. This is most commonly the area where workshops are given and where rope’em is held.

Floor Plan

To be updated

If you would like to collaborate or contribute, please contact us by e-mail bigfatpervs@riseup.net
